message.content:
@startuml
title GameEnginePluginLifecycle

participant "Host Application" as HA
participant "Host Application Interop" as HAI
participant "Game Engine Plugin" as GEP

== Initialization ==
activate HA
HA -> HAI : new
deactivate HA

activate HAI
HAI -> HAI : Load GE Plugin(s)
HAI -> GEP : load into memory
HAI -> GEP : GEP_Initialize
activate GEP
GEP --> HAI : initialization_ok = 0
deactivate GEP
deactivate HAI

loop Repeat Every Frame Period
  activate HAI
  HAI -> GEP : GEP_HandleSimulationResponseMessages
  activate GEP
  GEP --> HAI : handled_ok = 0
  deactivate GEP

  note over HAI,GEP
    delays
  end note

  HAI -> GEP : GEP_HandleSimulationControlMessages
  activate GEP
  GEP --> HAI : handled_ok = 0
  deactivate GEP
  deactivate HAI
end
@enduml
